'''âv-h-k-p''' ('''kavahkepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yete|yete]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-h-k-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yete|yete]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-h-k-p
|-
! Lemma
| kavahkepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivahkepoko|thivahkepoko]] || [[word:jivahkepoko|jivahkepoko]] || [[word:shivahkepoko|shivahkepoko]] || [[word:kivahkepoko|kivahkepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

|-
